sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gam la a nai gen in, Sihna thuak Topa Jesuh ,
Ama thu, A thuciamkip ding hi,
Topa Jesuh a umte, A min thang sak ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa Pasian kiangah, Hehpihna ngen te in,
Gupna thupha mantak a ngah thei
Topa Pasian kiangah, Hehpihna ngente in,
Gupna thupha mantak a ngah thei ding uh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sawtvei khuamial a omte, Mawhna lam a zuite,
Topa Jesuh’n tanna pi, En in
Lungsim na neihzah inah, A thuciamna umin,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Leitungah vangik puate, Gimna tawlna thuakmi,
Na vangik a pua dingin, Topa
